title: stelis platypetala
intro: Stelis platypetala, also known as the orchid plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis platypetala are said to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, Stelis platypetala can be made into a tea or infusion by steeping its flowers in hot water, or it can be used in traditional remedies in its raw form.
